word: G4161 - ποίημα - poíēma - poy'-ay-mah - Thing that is made

sections.paragraph:
- Original: ποίημα

- Transliteration: Poiema

- Phonetic: poy'-ay-mah

- Definition:

1. that which has been made

2. a work

a. of the works of God as creator

- Origin: from G4160

- TDNT entry: 13:38,9

- Part(s) of speech: Noun Neuter

- Strong's: From G4160; a product that is fabric (literally or figuratively): - thing that is made workmanship.
